comment: Shared expected outcomes both platforms' harnesses consume (platforms/apple/scripts/iterate.sh, platforms/windows/build/iterate.ps1). Keep platform-neutral; platform-specific tolerances live in the harnesses.

ocr.note: Assert on unambiguous tokens only — 'FileID' renders with I/| glyph ambiguity at this size on some OCR engines.

collisions.expect: Restructure/apply funnelling both to one destination keeps BOTH payloads on disk under distinct names; neither platform may ever overwrite (C2). Suffix convention is platform-local (macOS '_2', Windows ' (2)').

faces.note: faces/same-person-{a,b}.jpg pending — requires a rights-cleared face pair; used for cross-platform embedding-parity UAT (same person clusters together on both platforms; embeddings are approximate, not byte-equal, since detectors differ).

unicodeNames.expect: Every created name is scanned (or explicitly skip-logged); no silent drops; rename/tag round-trips preserve names byte-for-byte.
